subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the Paradise of the people of Bahá! What hath come to pass that for so long thou hast made thy nest and dwelling in the retreat of silence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقای فردوس اهل بهاء چه شد که مدتیست در آشیانه خاموشی لانه و آشیانه نمودید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @the power of words; of speech
